finding: The examples are real local merged cards but do not constitute print-ready publication text.
recommended_fix: Keep PRINT_ENTRY_EXAMPLES.md labeled as prototype evidence until G5/G6/G7/G10 pass.

finding: The agni entry has long citation-rich senses and multiple layers; a naive print renderer will produce unreadable wide tables.
recommended_fix: Define citation compaction and apparatus rules before implementing PDF/LaTeX/HTML rendering.

finding: The akzara entry requires homonym/gender blocks and nested labels such as 4b-alpha/beta/gamma.
recommended_fix: Renderer must support nested sense labels and visible gender/homonym grouping.

finding: The ap entry shows that NWS rows need compact owner badges and one-owner-one-row preservation.
recommended_fix: Use compact NWS owner badges in print while preserving one row per owner in the data.

finding: The ap entry contains German braced glosses and literal foreign glosses; the renderer must not treat all {%...%} content the same way.
recommended_fix: Keep German braced glosses as source evidence and preserve literal Latin/English/binomial forms when present in Russian output.

finding: Differentia notes explain Russian word choice but may be too technical for the main printed body.
recommended_fix: Keep differentia in digital apparatus by default; expose only if the editor chooses an explicit note style.
